name: LaunchPad - New Tab Shortcuts
description: Unlimited organized shortcuts on your new tab page. Groups, drag-and-drop, dark mode. Free and private.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' https: data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https:; font-src 'self';
